profile.name: Abdul Hafiz Khairi
profile.bio: Informatics Engineering student with a robust background in Computer & Network Engineering. Experienced in Kominfo's network infrastructure, system administration, and basic multimedia production.

experience.description: Designed and simulated complex network topologies connecting Kominfo's Data Server, the main Kominfo Office, and the Governor's Office using Cisco Packet Tracer, alongside providing localized network hardware maintenance.

skills.title: Network & Hardware
skills.details: MikroTik router configuration, MikroTik hotspot gateway management, LAN cabling architecture (Straight/Cross), modem configuration, and advanced Cisco Packet Tracer network simulation.

skills.title: System Administration
skills.details: OS deployment and automated setups for Windows and Linux (Ubuntu Desktop/Server) environments, combined with software troubleshooting.

skills.title: Multimedia Production
skills.details: Basic video editing, motion graphics design, sequence timing, and clip optimization within the Alight Motion application.

certificates.title: Python Programming Basics
certificates.description: Completed the Python Programming Basics course covering fundamental programming concepts, data structures, and problem-solving using Python.

certificates.title: Junior Technical Support — Wired Telecommunication Activities
certificates.description: Certified as competent in the field of wired telecommunication activities with the qualification of Junior Technical Support, issued by the National Professional Certification Agency of Indonesia.

certificates.title: IT Essentials
certificates.description: Completed the IT Essentials course as part of the Cisco Networking Academy program, covering hardware, software, operating systems, security, and troubleshooting fundamentals.
